description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined, classic design, painted predominantly in a vibrant red color with white accents and the number '167' prominently displayed on the wings and fuselage. The fuselage is rounded and tapers smoothly toward the tail, which features a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer in a conventional arrangement. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned just behind the propeller and ahead of the wing root, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The wings are low-mounted and straight, extending out from the lower part of the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angle. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration.
description: A small, red, single-propeller airplane with a low-wing, taildragger design and an enclosed single-seat cockpit. White accents and the number '167' are visible on the wings and fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, rounded fuselage, and symmetrical low wings with the number '167' on the left wing.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the enclosed cockpit, side windows, and the main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taildragger landing gear, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the straight wings.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective showing the tail section, horizontal stabilizer, and the number '167' on the right wing and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
